meta.project: POL263 — Multi-Tenant Insurance Policy Management System

product_overview: POL263 is a multi-tenant insurance & funeral policy management web app with three portals (Staff, Agent, Client) supporting full policy lifecycle, RBAC, payments, reporting and tenant whitelabeling. The app provides staff back-office tools (policies, claims, finance, products), agent-scoped workflows, and a client-facing portal for payments, documents and claims.
core_goals: Provide distinct portals for Staff, Agents and Clients with role-scoped access (RBAC) and tenant isolation.
Support end-to-end policy lifecycle: product creation, client enrollment, policy issuance, payments, receipts and status transitions.
Enable claims lifecycle management with document upload and approval workflows, with audit trail recording.
Deliver finance capabilities: payment transactions, receipts, cashups, month-end import and reconciliation.
Offer reporting and CSV export for operational and financial analysis.
Allow tenant whitelabeling (branding, logo, colors) and configurable organization settings.
Provide a responsive UI with light/dark theme, loading states, error handling and empty-state UX.

features.name: Landing Page / Portal Navigation
features.description: Public landing page with three portal cards (Staff, Agent, Client) and a theme toggle. The layout and portal buttons are documented in the PRD (see Home / Landing Page section and the screenshot on page 3).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View application title and three portal cards (Staff, Agent, Client) -> Click "Access Staff Portal" button -> Navigate to /staff/login
Navigate to / -> Click "Access Agent Portal" button -> Navigate to /agent/login
Navigate to / -> Click "Access Client Portal" button -> Navigate to /client/login
Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle button -> Observe theme changes between light and dark mode
Navigate to / -> Resize viewport to mobile -> Verify responsive layout (portal cards stack) -> See buttons still accessible (empty-state observation)

features.name: Staff Demo Login (development)
features.description: Development/demo email-based login for staff when Google OAuth isn't configured. See /staff/login and the 'Email (dev login)' input documented in the PRD (Auth section).
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/login -> Enter email address in the "Email (dev login)" input field (data-testid="input-demo-email") -> Click "Sign in (Dev)" button (data-testid="btn-demo-login") -> Wait for redirect to /staff -> See dashboard KPI cards
Navigate to /staff/login -> Leave email input empty -> Observe that "Sign in (Dev)" button is disabled
Navigate to /staff/login -> Enter email address -> Click "Sign in (Dev)" -> Server returns auth error (e.g. ?error=...) -> See auth error message displayed at top of form

features.name: Agent Login
features.description: Agent authentication using email and password; agent accounts must be pre-created by an admin. Failure displays an inline error. Entry route: /agent/login.
user_flows: Navigate to /agent/login -> Fill email input (data-testid="input-agent-email") -> Fill password input (data-testid="input-agent-password") -> Click Sign in button (data-testid="button-agent-login") -> Wait for redirect to /staff -> See agent-scoped dashboard
Navigate to /agent/login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input with incorrect credentials -> Click Sign in button -> See error message (data-testid="text-agent-login-error")
Navigate to /agent/login -> Submit with empty required fields -> See inline validation errors on email/password inputs

features.name: Client Login
features.description: Client login using policy number and password; entry route is /client/login. Invalid credentials show a toast error and account lockout rules apply after repeated failures (known constraint).
user_flows: Navigate to /client/login -> Enter policy number -> Enter password -> Click Sign in button -> Wait for redirect to /client -> See client dashboard with policy cards
Navigate to /client/login -> Enter policy number -> Enter wrong password -> Click Sign in button -> See error toast indicating invalid credentials
Navigate to /client/login -> Submit after 5 failed attempts -> Account locks for 15 minutes -> See account lockout message

features.name: Client Enrollment (activation)
features.description: First-time client account activation at /client/claim using activation code and policy number; flows include verification, password setup and security question configuration.
user_flows: Navigate to /client/claim -> Enter activation code and policy number -> Click Verify/Continue -> System verifies identity -> See password and security question form -> Enter new password and select/answer security question -> Click Activate -> Account activated -> Redirect to /client/login or auto-login
Navigate to /client/claim -> Enter invalid activation code -> Click Verify -> See error indicating invalid activation code
Navigate to /client/claim -> Enter valid code -> Enter password shorter than 8 characters -> Click Activate -> See inline password validation error

features.name: Staff Dashboard (KPIs & Filters)
features.description: Authenticated staff landing page at /staff that displays KPI cards, charts and interactive filters (date range, status, branch). For agents, the dashboard shows agent-scoped data only.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff -> View KPI cards (active policies, converted, lapse rate, retention) -> Select date range filters -> Select policy status filter -> Select branch filter -> See charts update (revenue trend, policy breakdown)
Login as agent -> Navigate to /staff -> Observe dashboard displays only agent-scoped KPIs and counts
Navigate to /staff -> Dashboard API returns error -> See toast error and empty-state indicators for KPI cards

features.name: Sidebar Navigation (Staff)
features.description: Hamburger menu-driven sidebar for staff portal navigation. Menu items are permission-aware and link to the various staff routes (e.g., /staff/clients, /staff/policies, /staff/reports).
user_flows: Navigate to any authenticated staff page (/staff) -> Click hamburger menu icon -> See sidebar open with navigation items (Dashboard, Clients, Policies, Claims, etc.) -> Click Clients item -> Navigate to /staff/clients
Navigate to /staff -> Click hamburger menu -> See Sign out button -> Click Sign out -> Be logged out and redirected to /
Login as staff without a permission -> Click hamburger menu -> Observe items requiring that permission are not visible

features.name: Client Management (CRUD)
features.description: Staff client management at /staff/clients: list, search, pagination, create, edit and manage dependents. National ID validation is enforced on client creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/clients -> View client list with pagination -> Use search to filter by name or national ID -> Click "New Client" -> Fill client details (name, national ID, DOB, gender, phone, address) -> Submit form -> See new client appear in list
Navigate to /staff/clients -> Click "New Client" -> Leave required fields blank -> Submit form -> See inline validation errors (including national ID format validation)
Navigate to /staff/clients -> Click on client row -> View client detail -> Edit client information -> Save changes -> See updated information

features.name: Policy Management
features.description: Full policy lifecycle management at /staff/policies including creation, detail view (members, payments, receipts, e-statements, documents) and status transitions. Receipts and e-statements can be viewed, printed, shared or downloaded.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/policies -> View policy list -> Click "New Policy" -> Select client, product version, set premium and schedule, assign agent/branch -> Submit form -> See new policy in list -> Click policy row -> View policy detail with tabs (info, members, payments, receipts, documents)

Open policy detail -> Click Record Payment -> Choose cash receipt -> Fill amount and channel -> Submit -> See payment recorded -> Policy status transitions to active (if first payment) -> See receipt in receipts table
Navigate to /staff/policies -> Click "New Policy" -> Omit required fields -> Submit -> See inline validation errors preventing creation

features.name: Claims Management
features.description: Claims lifecycle management at /staff/claims: create claims linked to policies, upload documents, and apply status transitions (submitted -> verified -> approved etc.) with approval notes or rejection reasons.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/claims -> View claims list -> Click "New Claim" -> Select linked policy -> Fill claim details -> Upload supporting documents -> Submit -> Claim appears in list with status submitted
Open claim detail -> Transition status from submitted -> verified -> approved by clicking appropriate actions -> Add approval notes -> See status history recorded
Open claim detail -> Attempt an invalid transition (e.g., approved -> submitted) -> See error preventing invalid transition

features.name: Product Configuration (Product Builder)
features.description: Create and manage products with versions, pricing, eligibility rules and add-ons at /staff/products. Multiple versions can exist per product.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/products -> View product list -> Click "Create product" -> Enter name and code -> Save product -> Add product version -> Enter pricing (monthly/weekly/biweekly) and eligibility -> Save version -> See version listed under product
Navigate to /staff/products -> Attempt to create product with duplicate code -> Submit -> See validation error preventing duplicate code creation

features.name: Finance Module
features.description: Finance area at /staff/finance showing payment transactions, receipts, cashups and month-end CSV upload. Supports credit notes, reversals and cash reconciliation.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/finance -> View payment transactions list -> Click Cashups -> Create new cashup by filling required fields -> Submit -> See new cashup in list
Navigate to /staff/finance -> Click Month-end upload -> Upload CSV file -> System validates and processes file -> See processed/errored rows in result view
Navigate to /staff/finance -> Upload an invalid CSV -> See validation error and reject notification

features.name: Client Payments
features.description: Client-side payment flows at /client/payments: view payment history, initiate premium payments via PayNow and other channels, and poll payment status. Note: PayNow requires external credentials in .env (known limitation).
user_flows: Navigate to /client/payments -> View payment history list -> Click Initiate Payment -> Select payment method (PayNow/Visa/etc.) -> Submit -> Payment widget opens/redirects -> System polls payment status -> On success, see payment recorded in history
Navigate to /client/payments -> Initiate PayNow payment when PayNow credentials are missing -> Payment fails -> See payment error notification and guidance (known limitation)
Navigate to /client/payments -> Initiate payment -> Payment provider returns failure -> See failure state and do not see new transaction in history

features.name: Reports and CSV Export
features.description: Reports at /staff/reports with selectable report types, filters (date range, branch, agent, product, status) and CSV export capability.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/reports -> Select report type (e.g., policies or finance) -> Set date range and filters -> Click Run/Refresh -> View report data table -> Click Export to CSV -> CSV file downloads
Navigate to /staff/reports -> Select date range where no data exists -> Run report -> See empty-state message in report table -> Export button disabled or export returns empty CSV

features.name: User Management
features.description: Staff user CRUD at /staff/users with role assignment, branch assignment and per-user permission overrides. New agent accounts can be created including passwords.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/users -> View user list with role badges -> Click "Create user" -> Fill email and display name and assign role/branch -> Submit -> New user appears in list
Navigate to /staff/users -> Create user with an email that already exists -> Submit -> See email uniqueness validation error
Navigate to /staff/users -> Open user row -> Toggle permission overrides -> Save -> See updated permission badges

features.name: Settings & Whitelabel
features.description: Organization settings at /staff/settings: update org name, upload logo, change primary color, manage terms and policy number formatting and feature flags. Changes apply tenant-wide and update public branding (login page).
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/settings -> View current settings -> Update organization name and upload new logo file -> Change primary color -> Click Save -> Reload login page (/staff/login) -> See updated branding reflected
Navigate to /staff/settings -> Upload unsupported file type for logo -> Click Save -> See file type validation error
Navigate to /staff/settings -> Change policy number prefix -> Save -> Create new policy -> See policy number generated with updated prefix

features.name: Audit Logs Viewer
features.description: Immutable audit trail at /staff/audit showing actor, action, entity type/ID and timestamp with date-range filters for investigation and compliance.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/audit -> View audit log entries list -> Use date range filter -> See filtered entries with actor, action, entity ID and timestamp -> Click entry to view before/after change details
Navigate to /staff/audit -> Set date range with no entries -> See empty-state message indicating no audit entries available

routes.description: Landing page with three portal cards (Staff, Agent, Client)
Staff login page with dev/demo email login
Agent login page with email and password
Client login page with policy number and password
Client first-time enrollment with activation code
Client password reset via security question
Agent referral landing page
Client self-registration via agent referral
Staff dashboard with KPIs, charts, and filters
Client management list with search and CRUD
Policy management with lifecycle, receipts, and documents
Claims management with status workflow
Product builder with versions and pricing
Funeral service items catalog
Group and community scheme management
Funeral case management with tasks and fleet
Finance module with transactions, cashups, and reports
CRM-lite lead pipeline
Reports with filters and CSV export
Employee and payroll run management
User management with role and permission assignment
Notification templates and delivery logs
Maker-checker approval queue
Organization branding, terms, feature flags
Multi-tenant organization management
Immutable audit trail viewer
System health and session diagnostics
Client dashboard with policies, payments, dependents
Client payment history and premium payment
Policy documents and receipt downloads
Client claim submission and tracking
Client complaints and feedback submission

Click "Access Staff Portal" to navigate to /staff/login
Click "Access Agent Portal" to navigate to /agent/login

Select client, product version, set premium and schedule
View policy detail with info, members, payments, receipts, and e-statement

Generate and view e-statement with date range

features.name: Claims Management

user_interactions: View claims list with status filter
Create new claim linked to a policy
Add approval notes or rejection reason

features.description: Product builder with versions, pricing, and eligibility
user_interactions: Configure eligibility rules and waiting periods

features.name: Finance Module
features.description: Financial operations including transactions, cashups, and month-end
user_interactions: View credit notes and reversal entries

features.name: Lead Pipeline
features.description: CRM-lite lead management with stages

features.name: Reports and Export
features.description: Report generation with filters and CSV export

features.name: User Management
features.description: Staff user CRUD with role and permission assignment
user_interactions: View user list with role badges

features.name: Settings
features.description: Organization branding and configuration
user_interactions: Update footer text and contact details

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Hamburger menu navigation for staff portal
user_interactions: Click hamburger menu icon to open sidebar
View navigation items (Dashboard, Clients, Policies, Claims, etc.)
Click navigation item to navigate to page
Click Sign out button to logout

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Light and dark mode toggle
user_interactions: Observe theme changes between light and dark mode

features.name: Groups Management
features.description: Community/corporate/family group management with batch receipting
user_interactions: Create new group (name, type, executive committee)
View group detail with linked policies

features.name: Audit Logs
features.description: Immutable audit trail viewer

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth not available in development mode; demo login must be used instead
known_limitations.impact: Staff must use email-based demo login when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is not configured

known_limitations.issue: PayNow payment integration requires external credentials
known_limitations.impact: Payment flows via PayNow will fail without PAYNOW_INTEGRATION_ID and PAYNOW_INTEGRATION_KEY in .env

known_limitations.issue: Dev server is single-threaded and may be slow under concurrent test load
known_limitations.impact: Tests should be run sequentially or the app should be built for production mode
